title: Provide a comprehensive learning support system
description: Conduct precise assessments, identify challenges related to reading and working memory, and deliver personalized AI-driven tutoring experiences.

title: Conduct precise assessments
description: Identify challenges related to reading and working memory.

title: Deliver personalized AI-driven tutoring experiences
description: Provide tailored educational interventions for individuals with learning disabilities.

title: Emulate human teaching methods in mathematics
description: Encourage reflection on both successful and challenging decisions made during interactive games.

title: Provide a tailored language tutoring environment
description: Use personalized games, activities, and a user interface tailored to the unique needs of individuals with Dyslexia.

title: Streamline the learning process
description: Easing the burden on parents and teachers while supporting children’s development.

title: Identify learning problems
description: Use fuzzy neural network (FNN) to identify learning difficulties specifically Dyslexia, Dyscalculia and Dysgraphia.

title: Teach the student according to their preferences
description: Use FNN to teach the student according to their preferences.

title: Create an interactive learning environment
description: Integrate elements such as chat, games, and voice interactions.

title: Provide a roadmap for developers and a key reference for stakeholders
description: Offer detailed insights into the functional and non-functional requirements essential for a successful system implementation.
